info.title: CompGraph
info.description: Competitive intelligence platform for field marketing agencies

get.description: Get the status of the most recent pipeline run.
Get the status of a specific pipeline run.

post.description: Pause the running scrape pipeline. Companies mid-scrape will finish their current page.
Gracefully stop the scrape pipeline. Running companies finish, pending are skipped.
Force stop the scrape pipeline. All tasks are cancelled immediately.

get.description: List all in-memory pipeline runs, most recent first.
Get the status of the most recent enrichment run.
Get the status of a specific enrichment run.
